# fix-n8n-fetch-failed-env
Description: Resolves n8n 'fetch failed' errors by ensuring the N8N_BASE_URL environment variable is correctly set in the local configuration.
Source: project
1. Identify the correct n8n base URL from your shared configuration or environment variables.
2. Locate the local environment configuration file for your application (e.g., `.env` in the project root).
3. Add or update the `N8N_BASE_URL` entry in this file with the identified URL. For example: `N8N_BASE_URL=https://your-n8n-instance.com`.
4. Save the changes to the configuration file.
5. Restart the application or service that uses this configuration to apply the new environment variable.
